nasb.text: When the lad reached the place of the arrow which Jonathan had shot, Jonathan called after the lad and said, “Is not the arrow beyond you?”

esv.text: And when the boy came to the place of the arrow that Jonathan had shot, Jonathan called after the boy and said, “Is not the arrow beyond you?”

cnv.text: 那童僕到了約拿單的箭射到的地方，約拿單就在那童僕的背後喊叫：“箭不是在你的前面嗎？”

ccb.text: 少年跑到落箭之处的时候，约拿单就大声叫道：“箭不是在你的前面吗？
